step_rationale: Regulates complement-mediated lipoprotein clearance and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: CR1 modulates complement-dependent oxidized lipoprotein clearance and inflammatory signaling in atherosclerotic plaque.

references.title: DSCAML1+ extracellular vesicles revealed by single-vesicle proteomics as a novel biomarker and therapeutic target in myocardial infarction.
Cell-mediated lipoprotein transport: a novel anti-atherogenic concept.
